all.en: For almost three months, I had trouble falling asleep before two in the morning.
all.zh: 將近三個月來，我都要到凌晨兩點才睡得著。

all.en: During the day, I felt tired, irritable, and unable to concentrate at work.
all.zh: 白天我感到疲倦、易怒，工作時也無法專心。

all.en: I finally decided to see a doctor at a sleep clinic recommended by my friend.
all.zh: 我終於決定去看朋友推薦的睡眠門診醫生。

all.en: The doctor asked detailed questions about my routine, diet, and screen time at night.
all.zh: 醫生詳細詢問了我的作息、飲食，以及晚上使用螢幕的時間。

all.en: He explained that my habit of checking my phone in bed was probably the main cause.
all.zh: 他解釋說，我在床上滑手機的習慣可能是最主要的原因。

all.en: He suggested keeping my phone outside the bedroom and reading a paper book instead.
all.zh: 他建議我把手機放在臥室外，改成讀紙本書。

all.en: I also began drinking warm chamomile tea about an hour before bedtime.
all.zh: 我也開始在睡前一小時左右喝溫熱的洋甘菊茶。

all.en: Every night, I tried to go to bed and wake up at the same time, even on weekends.
all.zh: 每天晚上，我盡量在固定時間上床和起床，連週末也不例外。

all.en: During the first week, the changes felt difficult and almost boring.
all.zh: 第一週，這些改變讓人覺得不容易，甚至有點無聊。

all.en: But by the third week, I was falling asleep within fifteen minutes.
all.zh: 但到了第三週，我都能在十五分鐘內入睡。

all.en: My mood and focus improved noticeably, and my friends said I looked healthier.
all.zh: 我的心情和專注力明顯改善，朋友也說我看起來更健康。

all.en: Good sleep, I learned, is just as important as eating well or exercising.
all.zh: 我體會到，良好的睡眠和飲食、運動同樣重要。

all.en: Encouraged by my progress, I bought a small lamp that mimics gentle sunrise light.
all.zh: 受到進步的鼓舞，我買了一盞模擬柔和日出光線的小檯燈。

all.en: It wakes me up slowly each morning instead of with a sharp ringing alarm.
all.zh: 它每天早上慢慢喚醒我，而不是用刺耳的鬧鈴。

all.en: My doctor also recommended a journal to record dreams and bedtime feelings.
all.zh: 醫生還建議我寫日記，記錄夢境和睡前的感受。

all.en: Writing helped me notice patterns of stress that I had ignored for months.
all.zh: 書寫讓我注意到自己幾個月來忽略的壓力模式。

all.en: I rearranged my bedroom by moving the desk far away from the bed.
all.zh: 我重新調整臥室擺設，把書桌移到離床很遠的地方。

all.en: Heavier curtains blocked the streetlight that used to shine through my window.
all.zh: 較厚的窗簾擋住了以前從窗外照進來的路燈光線。

all.en: On weekends, I practiced light stretching before bed to release shoulder tension.
all.zh: 週末睡前我會做輕度伸展，舒緩肩膀的緊繃。

all.en: After two months, I rarely woke up in the middle of the night.
all.zh: 兩個月後，我幾乎不再半夜醒來。

all.en: My family commented that my mood became softer and my patience grew stronger.
all.zh: 家人說我的脾氣變得溫和，耐心也比以前更好。

all.en: Sleep, I now understand, is the quiet foundation of every other healthy habit.
all.zh: 我現在明白，睡眠是其他所有健康習慣最安靜的基石。

all.en: My productivity at work soared once I started waking up refreshed every single morning.
all.zh: 當我每天早上醒來都神清氣爽後，工作效率隨之大幅提升。

all.en: My manager noticed my sharper focus and assigned me to lead a major project.
all.zh: 主管察覺到我的專注力提升，便指派我負責一個重要的專案。

all.en: I created a simple bedtime ritual that included gentle stretching and writing in a journal.
all.zh: 我建立了一個簡單的睡前儀式，包括輕柔的伸展和寫日記。

all.en: On nights when sleep still resisted, I used a guided meditation app for fifteen minutes.
all.zh: 那些還是睡不著的夜晚，我會用引導冥想App聽個十五分鐘。

all.en: I bought blackout curtains and a cooling pillow, which made a surprising difference.
all.zh: 我買了遮光窗簾和涼感枕頭，效果出乎意料地好。

all.en: My partner joined the new routine and admitted he felt happier and less stressed.
all.zh: 我的另一半也加入這套新作息，他坦言自己變得更快樂、壓力也減輕了。

all.en: We agreed to keep all screens out of the bedroom and saved an old alarm clock instead.
all.zh: 我們約好臥室裡完全不放螢幕，改用一個舊式的鬧鐘。

all.en: On weekends, we read paper novels by the window with cups of warm caffeine-free tea.
all.zh: 週末時，我們會在窗邊喝著無咖啡因的熱茶，讀紙本小說。

all.en: Every six months, I return to the sleep clinic for a friendly checkup and chat.
all.zh: 每半年，我會回到睡眠門診做一次愉快的回診與聊聊近況。

all.en: Good sleep, I have learned, is a daily love letter to my future healthier self.
all.zh: 我學到，好的睡眠就像每天寫給未來那個更健康的自己的一封情書。
